title: Designing Your Life
author: Bill Burnett
subline: How to build a well-lived, joyful life.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A 3-path 'Odyssey Plan' from the book: 3 diverging hairline lines from a single starting point. Each path ends at a different 'life' node. ONE path (the chosen one) is RED, thicker. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1280)" fill="none" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- Single starting node (the 'now') -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="14" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <text x="0" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">NOW</text>
    <!-- Path 1: up-left, 'Option A' -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-700" y2="-300" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="-700" cy="-300" r="20" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <text x="-700" y="-340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.2em">OPTION A</text>
    <text x="-700" y="-260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">energy +9 · growth +3</text>
    <!-- Path 2: up-right, 'Option B' — RED, thicker -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="700" y2="-300" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3.5"/>
    <circle cx="700" cy="-300" r="24" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <circle cx="700" cy="-300" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <text x="700" y="-340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">OPTION B</text>
    <text x="700" y="-260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="400" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em">energy +12 · growth +9</text>
    <!-- Path 3: down, 'Option C' -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="500" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="500" r="20" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <text x="0" y="540" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.2em">OPTION C</text>
    <text x="0" y="560" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">energy +5 · growth +6</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book's signature tool: the Odyssey Plan. A single starting node ('NOW') at the center, with 3 diverging hairline paths to 3 future life options. Path B (up-right) is RED 3.5px with a red bullseye at its end — the chosen path. Each path is labeled with energy + growth scores. The cover is literally the design-thinking decision tree for your life. Title sits in the middle, weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand 'ODYSSEY' in the bottom-right; pill 'v.3' at the bottom — version 3 of the plan, the iterated one.
